creator: bugs@rufus.in-berlin.de
text:
multimedia/gtk-youtube-viewer 3.11.3 does not install gtk-youtube-viewer into /usr/local/bin, only installs command-line part youtube-viewer

# freebsd-version
14.1-RELEASE-p4
# uname -a
FreeBSD pi.rufus.in-berlin.de 14.1-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p4 GENERIC amd64

# cd /usr/ports/multimedia/gtk-youtube-viewer
# make config
- check GTK2
- check MPLAYER
- check MPV
- check VLC

# make
# make install

# pkg info -l gtk-youtube-viewer
gtk-youtube-viewer-3.11.3:
        /usr/local/bin/youtube-viewer
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/WWW/YoutubeViewer.pm
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/WWW/YoutubeViewer/Activities.pm
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/WWW/YoutubeViewer/Authentication.pm
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/WWW/YoutubeViewer/Channels.pm
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/WWW/YoutubeViewer/CommentThreads.pm
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/WWW/YoutubeViewer/GetCaption.pm
...

# pkg info gtk-youtube-viewer
gtk-youtube-viewer-3.11.3
Name           : gtk-youtube-viewer
Version        : 3.11.3
Installed on   : Thu Sep  5 06:30:53 2024 CEST
Origin         : multimedia/gtk-youtube-viewer
Architecture   : FreeBSD:14:*
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : perl5 multimedia
Licenses       : GPLv3 or ART10
Maintainer     : nc@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://github.com/trizen/youtube-viewer
Comment        : GTK Search and play YouTube videos streaming in MPlayer
Options        :
        GTK2           : on
        MPLAYER        : on
        MPV            : on
        VLC            : on
Annotations    :
Flat size      : 449KiB
Description    :
GTK YouTube Viewer is created to be a flexible and reliable open-source
application which is dedicated to streaming YouTube Videos with MPlayer.

# pkg info -d gtk-youtube-viewer
gtk-youtube-viewer-3.11.3:
	p5-Gtk2-1.24993_3
	p5-libwww-6.77
	p5-Mozilla-CA-20240730
	p5-LWP-Protocol-https-6.14
	p5-Text-Tabs+Wrap-2024.001
	p5-Text-CharWidth-0.04_2
	vlc-3.0.21_4,4
	mpv-0.38.0_1,1
	mplayer-1.5.0.20240106
	perl5-5.36.3_2
	p5-common-sense-3.75
	p5-Term-ReadLine-Gnu-1.46
	p5-PathTools-3.7500
	p5-File-ShareDir-1.118
	p5-Data-Dump-1.25
	p5-JSON-XS-4.03
	p5-JSON-4.10
